item.title: About me
item.description: Hi there! I’m Digenaldo Neto. I’m a Software Engineer currently working at Jusbrasil, and my previous job was at Rede Globo. I work remotely, and I live in Northeastern Brazil. I’m a master’s degree student at IFPB, and my area of study is Networks and Distributed Systems. I hope to help you with my posts about software engineering, cybersecurity, and distributed software architecture on this page. Have a nice day.
